title: Fix inner-layer copper pour rendering
description: test :https:pcb-viewer-1oocgd3ju-tscircuit.vercel.app?fixture7B22path223A22src2Fexamples2F20262Frepros2Finner-layer-copper-pours.fixture.tsx227D https:pcb-viewer-1oocgd3ju-tscircuit.vercel.app?fixture7B22path223A22src2Fexamples2F20262Frepros2Foverlapping-inner-layer-copper-pours.fixture.tsx227D render copper pours through the shared copper layer loop used by other copper elements while tracespadstext already looped across top, bottom, and inner1-inner6 remove the duplicate topbottom-only copper pour draw pass add an 8-layer repro fixture covering top, inner1-inner6, and bottom
body:
test :https://pcb-viewer-1oocgd3ju-tscircuit.vercel.app/?fixture=%7B%22path%22%3A%22src%2Fexamples%2F2026%2Frepros%2Finner-layer-copper-pours.fixture.tsx%22%7D

https://pcb-viewer-1oocgd3ju-tscircuit.vercel.app/?fixture=%7B%22path%22%3A%22src%2Fexamples%2F2026%2Frepros%2Foverlapping-inner-layer-copper-pours.fixture.tsx%22%7D
- render copper pours through the shared copper layer loop used by other copper elements while traces/pads/text already looped across top, bottom, and inner1-inner6
- remove the duplicate top/bottom-only copper pour draw pass
- add an 8-layer repro fixture covering `top`, `inner1`-`inner6`, and `bottom`

description: Removes unused methods and variables from the BoardGeomBuilder class to streamline the codebase and improve maintainability.

title: Add support for orientation for symbols with `_horz/_vert` similar to the `_(right|left|up|down)`
description: Adds logic to ensure schematic symbols with orientation suffixes (_horz_vert) maintain correct visual orientation after group placement rotations.
body:
### Motivation
- Ensure schematic symbols that include an orientation suffix (`_horz`/`_vert`) keep the correct visual orientation after group placement rotations. 

### Description
- Added logic in `lib/components/primitive-components/Group/Group_doInitialSchematicLayoutMatchPack.ts` to detect a symbol name suffix matching `_(horz|vert)`. 
- Compute a normalized rotation from `placement.ccwRotationDegrees` and, for 90° or 270° rotations, replace the suffix to swap `_horz` ↔ `_vert`. 
- Also kept the existing behavior that rotates text positions and direction suffixes like `_(right|left|up|down)`. 
- Updated the generated snapshot `tests/repros/__snapshots__/repro108-multiple-gunn-diode-fails-to-render-schematic.snap.svg` to reflect the adjusted layout/rotation output.

### Testing
- Ran the automated test suite with snapshot tests and updated the failing snapshot at `tests/repros/__snapshots__/repro108-multiple-gunn-diode-fails-to-render-schematic.snap.svg`; the test run succeeded.

------
[Codex Task](https://chatgpt.com/codex/cloud/tasks/task_b_69de2c8e86448327b87f5d57cbd610cb)

title: Support rotated pill-hole-with-rect-pad plated hole
description: Internally converts platedhole shapepill_hole_with_rect_pad pcbRotation...  to rotated_pill_hole_with_rect_pad, matching the existing rotated hole behavior, and adds reverse circuit-json mapping for compatibility.
body:
- internally convert `<platedhole shape="pill_hole_with_rect_pad" pcbRotation={...} />` to `rotated_pill_hole_with_rect_pad`, matching the existing rotated `hole` behavior
- add the reverse circuit-json mapping so `rotated_pill_hole_with_rect_pad` imports back into `PlatedHole` with `pcbRotation`
- keep rotated and non-rotated paths as separate explicit branches for readability
- add a regression test and snapshot for rotated pill-hole-with-rect-pad plated holes

title: Include vias in obstacle connectivity
description: Fixes autorouter obstacle generation so pcb_via obstacles include their own connectivity id instead of always using an empty connectedTo list.
body:
Fixes autorouter obstacle generation so pcb_via obstacles include their own connectivity id instead of always using an empty connectedTo list.

  Previously, vias were emitted as anonymous obstacles, unlike SMTPads and plated holes, which meant routed copper could not recognize them as connected copper in the simple-route obstacle model.

title: Add phased local autorouting by routingPhaseIndex
description: Implements phased local autorouting for groups, allowing higher-priority routes to be preserved by routing traces and nets in phases based on their routingPhaseIndex.
body:
Implements phased local autorouting for groups. Traces and nets are grouped by
  routingPhaseIndex, numbered phases route first, and null routes last. After each
  phase, routed trace geometry is added as obstacles for later phases so higher-priority
  routes are preserved.

title: Deduplicate logical ports from composite footprint copper
description: Fixes composite footprints where multiple copper primitives share the same logical pin, such as an SMT pad plus plated hole with the same portHints.
body:
Fixes composite footprints where multiple copper primitives share the same logical pin,
  such as an SMT pad plus plated hole with the same portHints.

  Previously, footprint port discovery returned one port per copper primitive, so repeated
  pin1/pin2 hints could inflate the inferred pin count and create extra logical pins like
  pin3 and pin4.

  This adds a shared helper to normalize footprint portHints, merge aliases, and dedupe
  ports by logical pin number for both string and JSX footprints.

title: Add click-to-inspect object labels for canvas rendering
description: Adds a debug toggle for enabling object interaction on the canvas, allowing users to click on labeled objects to view their labels, while hiding labels by default.
body:
## Summary
- hide canvas labels by default, including inline arrow labels, unless explicitly enabled
- add an `Enable Object Interation` debug toggle that opens a dialog when a labeled canvas object is clicked
- add shared canvas hit-testing for points, lines, arrows, polygons, circles, rects, and infinite lines
- cover the new hit-testing behavior with targeted tests

## Testing
- `bun test`
- `bun run build`

title: Fix Pipeline4 preview fallback for tiny hypergraph pathing
description: Fixes fallback behavior in Pipeline4 to return portPointPathingSolver.preview() when high-density preview output is unavailable.
body:
## Summary
- return `portPointPathingSolver.preview()` from Pipeline4 when high-density preview output is not available
- keep existing later-stage preview behavior unchanged
- add a regression test covering the tiny hypergraph pathing preview fallback

## Testing
- `bun test tests/autorouting-pipeline4-high-density-repair.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`

description: Adds static reachability precheck to the Tiny Hypergraph solver to identify statically unroutable routes before attempting to solve them.

title: Refactor bus solver into focused helper modules
description: Summary extract boundary planning into BusBoundaryPlanner move shared bus solver types and preview-state utilities into dedicated modules pull pure path and goal-search helpers out of TinyHyperGraphBusSolver remove dead bus preview code and simplify solver coordination logic update bus routing tests to use the extracted boundary planner seam  Testing bun test testssolvercm5io-bus-routing.test.ts bunx tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false --ignoreDeprecations 5.0
body:
## Summary
- extract boundary planning into `BusBoundaryPlanner`
- move shared bus solver types and preview-state utilities into dedicated modules
- pull pure path and goal-search helpers out of `TinyHyperGraphBusSolver`
- remove dead bus preview code and simplify solver coordination logic
- update bus routing tests to use the extracted boundary planner seam

## Testing
- `bun test tests/solver/cm5io-bus-routing.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false --ignoreDeprecations 5.0`

title: Region Span Reproduction
description: Adds a new page for reproducing bus routing scenarios with a focus on region spans in the Tiny Hypergraph solver.

title: Add bus2
description: Adds a new bus configuration with multiple connection patches for PCB ports in the circuit design.

title: don't draw last candidate
description: Prevents the visualization of the last candidate in the solvers output when the solver has already found a solution.

title: Fix local high-density repair pushes
description: Track clearance conflicts at the route-point level so push cascades move only nearby overlapping segments instead of whole traces or unrelated route sections. Keep pushed routes eligible for later side processing, add tangential fallback moves, and reject full-route zero-clearance regressions so the cmn_3 top-left trace shifts without introducing overlaps. Improves autorouter results:
body: Track clearance conflicts at the route-point level so push cascades move only nearby overlapping segments instead of whole traces or unrelated route sections. Keep pushed routes eligible for later side processing, add tangential fallback moves, and reject full-route zero-clearance regressions so the cmn_3 top-left trace shifts without introducing overlaps. Improves autorouter results:

title: Expose Trace Clearance Violations with Live Solver Metrics and Visual Debug Markers
description: Adds real-time trace clearance validation to the high-density repair solver, enabling detection of trace-to-trace clearance conflicts and rendering visual markers for violations during repair iterations.
body: Introduce Trace Clearance Violations with visual support. Upgrades the high-density repair solver with real-time trace clearance validation, making hidden spacing issues immediately visible during repair iterations. Improvements Adds traceViolationCount to solver stats and output metrics Detects trace-to-trace clearance conflicts using configurable thresholds Filters same-net and via-only cases to focus on meaningful violations Renders visual trace violation markers directly in solver debug output Improves repair observability and debugging confidence
